---
title: "Zoe So's Portfolio"
format: html
---

## Hello

Welcome to my portfolio / blog.

## About me
I am currently a University of Toronto student. I created this site as I have some experience with programming and data analysis (almost all in R) that I want to showcase. These are all my own personal projects (not any schoolwork that I have submitted, though it could be inspired by my lectures or a re-do of work from courses that have already ended).

### Thank you for visiting!
